hero.title: Lingmo OS
hero.subtitle: Elegant. Fast. Open.
hero.description: Built for everyone. Designed for the future.

features.title: Why Lingmo OS?
features.description: Discover what makes Lingmo OS the perfect choice for your daily computing needs.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: Fast boot times and responsive performance even on older hardware. Lingmo OS is optimized to make the most of your system resources, ensuring smooth multitasking and a snappy user experience.

security.title: Security
security.description: Built on a rock-solid Linux foundation with regular security updates, mandatory access controls, and encrypted storage. Your data stays safe with Lingmo OS.

developer.title: Developer Friendly
developer.description: Comprehensive development tools and environment support out of the box. From compilers to containers, Lingmo OS provides everything you need to build, test, and deploy software.

design.title: Beautiful Design
design.description: A modern, intuitive user interface that is both aesthetically pleasing and highly functional. Lingmo OS brings you a cohesive visual experience across the entire desktop.

openSource.title: Open Source
openSource.description: Fully open source under GPL v3.0. Every line of code is transparent, auditable, and free to use, modify, and share. The community drives the direction of the project.

communityDriven.title: Community Driven
communityDriven.description: Built by the community, for the community. Your contributions, feedback, and ideas shape the future of Lingmo OS every day.

download.pageDescription: Get the latest version of Lingmo OS. Choose from stable, beta, or nightly builds.
download.dialogSubtitle: Choose the edition and architecture before downloading.
download.downloadHint: You may safely close this dialog.

about.pageDescription: Learn about the history, mission, and vision behind Lingmo OS.
about.storyText: Lingmo OS began as CuteOS in early 2023, a project based on Ubuntu with the fishUI framework. It was renamed to SwiftOS in April 2023, and finally to Lingmo OS in May 2023. Today, Lingmo OS is developed by a global community of contributors, powered by the rock-solid Debian GNU/Linux base with the elegant Lingmo Desktop Environment.
about.missionText: To provide a free, open-source operating system that respects user privacy and delivers an exceptional computing experience.
about.visionText: A world where everyone has access to powerful, elegant, and secure computing tools, free from corporate control.
about.timeline2023Desc: Project founded as CuteOS, based on Ubuntu with fishUI framework. Renamed to SwiftOS in April, then Lingmo OS in May. First public releases and community building.
about.timeline2024Desc: LingmoOS 2.0 'Hydrogen' released, fully migrated to Debian base with Lingmo Desktop Environment. Polaris beta series, community growth, and infrastructure expansion.
about.timeline2025Desc: LingmoOS 3.0 'Helium' (NextOS) released with major performance improvements, new LingmoUI toolkit, and support for 20+ languages.
about.timeline2026Desc: Ongoing development with expanded hardware support, refined desktop experience, and a growing global community of contributors and users.
about.archKernelDesc: Linux kernel with custom patches for optimal performance and hardware support, based on the rock-solid Debian GNU/Linux foundation.
about.archDesktopDesc: Lingmo Desktop Environment (LingmoDE) built with Qt Quick and LingmoUI, featuring a macOS-inspired global menu and smooth Wayland compositor.
about.archAppsDesc: Curated suite of applications designed for productivity and creativity, with a unified UI/UX experience across the entire desktop ecosystem.
